description_for_human: Curated catalog of AI tools, techniques, tutorials, and art references from Instagram.
description_for_model: Search and browse a curated catalog of 334+ AI tools, techniques, tutorials, repos, and art references. Each entry is classified by tier (S/A/B/C), type, and tagged with tools, techniques, domains. Use /api/catalog.json for full data, /api/tools.json for tool/technique indices, /api/creators.json for creator data. Art entries include medium, style_tags, and subject_matter fields.
